{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093145D0D5556A64EB801C4D3E"}"},"total":407},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615408512446563096","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者是有想法的 书写的确实可以 像这种章回体类型且剧情优质的在番茄相当少见 评分低可能是内容太少更的太慢了  有点毒点但总体来说值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773105664,"group_id":"7595240954823461912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6aa1VJxRirLs5HKmoTxlpplZFMrIsNXhMPe2EPmHVD7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5478bd342ff74a64b40fe68f8f205a64~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776881068&x-signature=DcN%2BRTpQ%2B8zYhcTAX38pIFN76zU%3D","user_id":"1215397683797556","user_name":"西红柿朝蛋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1215397683797556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595240954823461912","book_info":{"abstract":"新书刚出分，感谢捧场！
【不是好人】【杀伐果断】【边关争霸】
【铁血权谋】【多女主】【架空历史】
穿越边关，并不是醒掌天下权的美梦，而是把脑袋别在裤腰带上的挣扎。
蜂窝煤、陌刀、精钢，这些能够富国强兵的技术，在乱世里不仅是财富，更是招来杀身之祸的引信。
在这个只有刀剑说话的世道，想要活下去，你要么做跪着求生的狗，要么做提刀杀人的狼。
周起从尸堆中醒来，还没喘匀气，就撞上了边军最荒唐的“发营妻”。
满营兵痞都在疯抢能干活的壮妇，只有他走向了角落里那个最瘦弱、最漂亮的罪臣之女，捏起她的下巴：
“还能走吗？跟我走。”
宁朝立国两百载，早已外强中干。北有天狼铁骑年年打草谷，内有世家勋贵吸血边军。
当那个拥有特种作战经验的灵魂，在这个礼崩乐坏的乱世睁开双眼时……
周起摸着刀柄，看着那些高高在上的权贵，笑得阴鸷：
“这世道烂透了。既然你们占着茅坑不拉屎，那钱粮、地盘、还有你们的……夫人，我都接手了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/80c978b2e8a4c7d6fa971cbe8ef22adf","author":"一宁会发光ogsun","author_id":"","book_id":"7595240954823461912","book_name":"边军：从领取罪女开始，一统天下","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0a880","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595258026815128088","read_count":"98041","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"336895"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"118","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,特种兵,架空,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2obf11e8fa6b0e582e3a060e83feee4b68~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499905&x-signature=Jzj0wLJ1HEzR1SH7d3ZEmAQuMeY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"828366264995691","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"101"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324093145D0D5556A64EB801C4D3E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_co
